sentences.arabic: حِينَ نَقُولُ «لَا» نَحْمِي أَنْفُسَنَا مِنَ التَّعَبِ.
sentences.translation: Kada kažemo "ne" štitimo sebe od umora.
sentences.translationEn: When we say "no" we protect ourselves from exhaustion.

sentences.arabic: طُلِبَ مِنْ سُلْطَانَ أَنْ يَعْمَلَ لِسَاعَاتٍ إِضَافِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Od Sultana je traženo da radi prekovremene sate.
sentences.translationEn: Sultan was asked to work extra hours.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ بِهُدُوءٍ «أَنَا مُتْعَبٌ وَأَحْتَاجُ إِلَى الرَّاحَةِ».
sentences.translation: Mirno je rekao "umoran sam i trebam odmor".
sentences.translationEn: He calmly said "I am tired and I need rest".

sentences.translation: Poznavanje naših granica je važna stvar za naše zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Knowing our limits is an important thing for our health.
